description: My car was parked in my driveway during a hailstorm on June 12th. The hood, roof, and trunk have multiple dents, and the windshield is cracked. No other vehicles were involved.
resolution_notes: Comprehensive coverage applied; hail damage is a covered peril under comprehensive auto coverage. Deductible applied, repair estimate approved.

description: My teenage son borrowed my car without permission and got into a collision with a parked vehicle. He does not have a driver's license yet.
resolution_notes: Claim denied under the unlicensed/unauthorized driver exclusion clause. Policyholder advised to review named-driver endorsement options.

description: A pipe burst in the upstairs bathroom while we were on vacation, causing water damage to the ceiling and flooring below. We discovered it three days after returning home.
resolution_notes: Sudden and accidental water discharge is covered; however, mold remediation costs were partially excluded due to delayed discovery. Adjuster requested moisture inspection report.

description: Heavy rainfall caused a nearby river to overflow, flooding our basement with about two feet of water and damaging furniture and electronics.
resolution_notes: Standard homeowners policy excludes flood/surface water damage; requires separate flood insurance policy (e.g., NFIP). Claim redirected to flood policy if one exists.

description: I went to the ER after experiencing chest pains. Tests showed it was a false alarm related to acid reflux. The hospital billed $4,800 for the visit.
resolution_notes: Emergency room visits for symptoms suggesting a medical emergency are covered under the prudent layperson standard, regardless of final diagnosis.

description: I want to get cosmetic rhinoplasty and am submitting a claim to see if my plan will cover any portion of the procedure.
resolution_notes: Elective cosmetic procedures not related to a covered medical necessity are excluded under the policy's cosmetic surgery exclusion clause.

description: My car was stolen from a public parking garage downtown two nights ago. I filed a police report and have the case number. The vehicle has not been recovered.
resolution_notes: Comprehensive coverage includes theft. Police report and comprehensive coverage confirmed; payout based on actual cash value minus deductible.

description: Someone broke into my home while I was away and stole jewelry I recently appraised at $45,000, but I don't have receipts and there's no police report yet because I wanted to check with insurance first.
resolution_notes: Missing police report and lack of proof of ownership for high-value items flagged for further investigation before payout consideration. Policyholder advised to file police report immediately.
